description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to master, develop, and build branches, and on pull requests to these branches. The workflow should have three jobs: build-macos, build-linux, and build-windows, each running on a different environment (macos-latest, ubuntu-latest, and windows-2019 respectively). Each job should check out the repository, determine the KALDI_BRANCH, and then perform specific build and packaging steps for their respective environments, finally uploading the produced wheels as artifacts.
